name: Scenic Hot Springs
description: Natural hot springs near Stevens Pass in the Central Cascades.

name: Sol Duc Hot Springs
description: Three mineral soaking pools in Olympic National Park surrounded by old-growth forest.
insider_tips: The third pool from the entrance is the warmest and least crowded.
nearby_gems: Sol Duc Falls (1.6 miles), Appleton Pass trail
alerts: No current alerts - all pools open

name: Hot Springs (Town)
description: Small unincorporated community in King County with natural hot springs.

name: Mount Baker Hot Springs
description: Natural hot springs in the Mount Baker area of the North Cascades.

name: Gamma Hot Springs
description: Remote hot springs in the Glacier Peak Wilderness, requires a long hike.

name: Goldmyer Hot Springs
description: Natural hot springs deep in the Cascades near North Bend, accessible via hike or mountain bike.
insider_tips: Reservations required via goldmyer.org. The hike is 12 miles round trip.

name: Baker Hot Springs
description: Natural hot springs near Mount Baker in the Mt. Baker-Snoqualmie National Forest.

name: Olympic Hot Springs
description: Natural, undeveloped hot springs in Olympic National Park near Port Angeles. Free but requires a 2.5-mile hike.
insider_tips: Water temperature varies with river flow. Check with ranger station for conditions.

name: Wind River Hot Springs
description: Natural hot springs along the Wind River in Carson, Gifford Pinchot National Forest.

name: Doe Bay Hot Springs
description: Resort hot springs on Orcas Island with ocean views, sauna, and soaking tubs.

name: Ohanapecosh Hot Springs
description: Historic hot springs site in Mount Rainier National Park. The springs are mostly cooled but the area has cultural significance.

name: Skamania Hot Springs
description: Natural hot springs in Skamania County near the Columbia River Gorge.

name: Bagby Hot Springs
description: Historic bathhouse in Mt Hood National Forest, 1.4-mile hike to rustic cedar tubs.

name: Breitenbush Hot Springs
description: Retreat center with natural rock pools along the Breitenbush River.

name: Terwilliger (Cougar) Hot Springs
description: Deep turquoise pool in old-growth forest, 0.25-mile hike from trailhead.

name: Umpqua Hot Springs
description: Scenic pools overlooking the Umpqua River, 0.3-mile hike.

name: McCredie Hot Springs
description: Free roadside springs along the North Fork of the Willamette River.

name: Belknap Hot Springs
description: Landscaped pools at Belknap Lodge along the McKenzie River.

name: Carson Hot Springs Resort
description: Historic mineral bathhouse and hotel in the Columbia River Gorge.

name: Saint Martin's Hot Springs
description: Three rock pools along a creek in the Columbia Gorge, short hike.

name: Moffett's Hot Springs
description: Natural pool along the Wind River, hidden forest setting.

name: Kitson Hot Springs
description: Remote springs in the Willamette National Forest along Salt Creek.

name: Alvord Hot Springs
description: Desert springs at the base of Steens Mountain with stunning views.

name: Mickey Hot Springs
description: Geothermal area in the Alvord Desert, pools too hot for soaking in most spots.

name: Crystal Crane Hot Springs
description: Resort with a large outdoor pool and private soaking tubs in Harney County.

name: Hart Mountain Hot Springs
description: Natural rock pool on Hart Mountain National Antelope Refuge.

name: Snively Hot Springs
description: Riverside pool along the Owyhee River in eastern Oregon canyon country.

name: Givens Hot Springs
description: Historic roadside soaking pool along the Snake River in eastern Oregon.

name: Mundo Hot Springs
description: Small resort with covered soaking pool in eastern Oregon ranching country.

name: Paulina Hot Springs
description: Natural pools near East Lake in the Newberry National Volcanic Monument.

name: Three Forks Hot Spring
description: Remote canyon springs at the confluence of three streams in SE Oregon.

name: Willow Creek Hot Springs
description: BLM campground with natural soaking pool in the high desert.

name: Bigelow Hot Spring
description: Small natural pool along the McKenzie River trail.

name: Fisher Hot Springs
description: Warm pool in the high desert, near the Nevada border.

name: Blue Mountain Hot Springs
description: Natural springs in the Blue Mountains of eastern Oregon.

name: Juntura Hot Springs
description: Island pool in Malheur River; free; primitive high desert setting; clothing-optional.

name: Lithia Springs Resort
description: Luxury resort in Ashland with private mineral soaking tubs, wine garden, spa.

name: Wall Creek Hot Springs
description: Small natural meditation pool near Ukiah; free; 2-mile hike; clothing-optional.

name: Paulina Lake Hot Springs
description: Lakeside pools at Paulina Lake in Newberry Volcanic Monument; $5 vehicle fee; clothing-optional.

name: East Lake Hot Springs
description: Small pool on East Lake shore in Newberry Volcanic Monument; accessible by boat or short hike; clothing-optional.

name: Grande Hot Springs
description: Resort with outdoor pools near Joseph in the Wallowa Mountains; $15 day use; family-friendly.

name: Summer Lake Hot Springs
description: Resort with indoor/outdoor pools near Summer Lake; $15 day use; alkaline mineral waters; birdwatching.

name: Hot Lake Hot Springs
description: Historic restored 1900s resort near La Grande with indoor pools and spa.

name: Ritter Hot Springs
description: Small remote resort with pools near Ritter in Grant County; $10 day use.

name: Borax Lake Hot Springs
description: Small alkaline lake in Alvord Desert — too hot for soaking, view only; protected area.

name: Austin Hot Springs
description: Primitive undeveloped springs near Austin in Grant County; extreme heat, caution advised.
